overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a dark industrial underpass beneath an elevated highway into a bustling commercial plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical holographic tower. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with vibrant neon signs, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians.

events.description: emerging from dark shadow into brighter daylight at the underpass exit
slight left turn to follow the sidewalk path alongside graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark industrial underpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with metal supports
dark industrial building with red neon Kawasaki signage
steam emission rising from street level vents
staircase leading up to the highway level
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark industrial underpass beneath an elevated highway, with the player walking toward a bright exit. Steam rises from vents on the left near a concrete stairwell, while a red neon Kawasaki sign is visible on an industrial building. The environment is empty of pedestrians with only sparse traffic visible on the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with graffiti art under highway

events.description: transitioning from industrial underpass to urban sidewalk with prominent graffiti walls
futuristic vehicles passing by on the adjacent multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to graffiti-covered concrete walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art and murals
large cylindrical support column for the overhead highway
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
tall street light pole along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the player passes extensive graffiti art on the left wall while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The area is sparsely populated with occasional pedestrians visible ahead, and the environment transitions from industrial to more urban in character.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian walkway approaching commercial district

events.description: crowd density increases with groups of pedestrians walking ahead
exiting the covered underpass into the open commercial plaza with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking with the flow of pedestrians toward the brightly lit commercial district

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the plaza

entered.detail: modern building with prominent green neon trim and curved architecture
massive cylindrical tower covered in rotating holographic advertisements
trees with pink and white blossoms lining the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks with moderate crowds under the highway overpass, approaching a vibrant commercial district. A massive cylindrical holographic tower becomes visible in the distance, while modern buildings with green neon accents line the right side. The environment opens up as the player nears the plaza exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with holographic tower and crosswalk

events.description: approaching crosswalk and waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass
stepping onto the crosswalk and crossing the street toward the tower

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk toward the massive holographic tower

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
traffic light pole with illuminated signals
building entrance with bright neon signage at the tower base

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open commercial plaza, the player approaches a massive cylindrical holographic tower covered in vibrant advertisements. The player waits at the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass, then crosses the street toward the tower entrance. The area is bustling with pedestrians and bathed in bright morning sunlight mixed with neon glow from the surrounding signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim industrial underpass into a vibrant, sunlit commercial plaza. It begins in a dark concrete corridor beneath an elevated highway, moving past rising steam vents and a red neon Kawasaki sign toward a bright exit. As the camera advances along a covered sidewalk, the industrial surroundings shift toward an urban character, passing extensive graffiti walls while futuristic vehicles stream by on the right. The scene then opens up as the player moves through growing crowds and past green neon accents, bringing a massive cylindrical holographic tower into view in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges into the open plaza, crossing a bustling street bathed in morning sunlight and neon glow to approach the towering holographic advertisements.
